guards.description: devai-gates.yml's 'Validate stynx invariants against the schema' step globs this directory. It silently validated zero files for an unknown period after the directory was renamed from docs/architecture/invariants/ (fixed alongside this guard, per devai D-124 / governance-roadmap item 7).
devai-gates.yml's PR-trigger paths: filter includes reference/** (relocated from apps/reference-{api,web}). A zero-match here would mean the workflow can never fire on changes under this tree.
